name: Trump Headquarters
subject: POTUS asked us to invite you -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Don’t miss your chance to dine with the President. |
---
| | | | | | |
Peter,

YOU have always been the core of this movement, and that's why the President asked us to invite you to dinner.

**One lucky winner will be flown to a terrific dinner with President Trump.**[ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c5e1c4bbdef1e6f9b068e2140a2c4f6c98b386a4d438c45dd224c04d933148922b4bb7539802b4c0b)
---
| **[Just contribute at least $3 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c7593ecff939a2b2d43588bb7939b0a19284edea71191489e13e32039182a176f93cf04b512065cd0)**
[CONTRIBUTE $3](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c690db1ad3cfa2b999bfaa4436e596b9817774948a573dd7998863e22832a431a413b09bf45878e20)
You don't want to miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet our Commander-in-Chief face to face.

President Trump is looking forward to meeting you, Peter. Good luck!

**[Contribute at least $3 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c795a5df066c1c99727c2777941975791bd946f3075ac36ad416ec9426509e93ab8bb6d8f44ed595f)**

MAGA,

Trump Headquarters
**[ENTER TO WIN](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c8c7ccf7881f98dda22ed6807ec4100eed32cae2978f10770f9680945d6f5fb2bcb55c248ae086561)**
---

**\---------- Forwarded Message ----------**
From: Donald J. Trump
Date: October 12, 2017
Subject: Join me in Dallas
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cf47ae79a57636ff33fef8758fee58b003b81c13670f571202d0b089dd38a7874bb05de2c75a39037)**

Peter,

YOU have always been the core of what my presidency is about.

That's why it's always a great pleasure for me to take some time to meet with the Americans who have supported me since the beginning.

I'm hosting a wonderful dinner on October 25th for my loyal supporters, and I hope you'll attend, Peter.

---
**[All it takes is a contribution of at least $3 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cffa1274f1c177688ed8659ee08ae65f2978bfe6e1bf8b146a0aa23e104e1e8aa77259c514195e3de)**
[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c30bb8e3c0c69d549b781f4fc365db10ff4ac282b89fa71d1bf4d4bd418622590a82aa773b8566513) [CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cb352f0c6a9a663d06ce0e7c2866ed5610b5ce9d702aa9aa41836937b7a976ea75616f821f5fe67b2) [CONTRIBUTE $75](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c56bc8f8605d090492f1c7acd4182376afd673c16b2a6ef004fe730796ecaf64e1a2e680c4c3d9d34) [CONTRIBUTE $50](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cdb36ffa70443809dd205e65ee04b16034bbc86f0351a8e12cb485f77a87d74878515f5dad51b9f07) [CONTRIBUTE $35](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c0c0bc8895f569742b3537dfc0f51578bd58f23ad0b58ca931286bd20abb45f5d5835543387f82d03) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c7cc2852d91c7a9130e7633de196700b2c689738999f7bc4b071680777fc75cecd871940d20250fb3)
I'm looking forward to meeting the lucky winner. See you there!

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cc4c01338bcdbb3f09b4751147491fea1937aa9dcab4bc24e9082a0f687ed4b907d381d97f0e93186)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States**[ENTER TO WIN](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c90c581f6159aaeac99f039965418f837b6f3ee27c8171bc677e8872a9ff2f01af2892e3bc15bfd18)**
---

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN.** Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Republican National Committee by clicking [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90ce17bea6da743023229c9969d16d5338f0514bd005c102c6f40309511001eed16b282668d252ee70c). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90c7ab7513c19fab1185051cc9d567b0557301946320fc03679bb5a759b1a3cbff4c63898d6414b71f9). Entries must be received between October 12, 2017 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and October 20, 2017 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend a dinner with President Trump at the October 25, 2017 Trump Victory Dinner in Dallas (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cca829a11fe17a95fe0641da27b94ca24504202a3ca6b71b6ed93887ca911107bb183bf6b9ffc372b) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Republican National Committee, 310 First St. SE, Washington, D.C. 20003.
Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cd66d7dd5c1f2f435630277d754cf38c2de5048523b1ecc69fc483a92a2c6dffdc7086be69971b96f) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8cdc7df346dd90cae16e4b29a26580edf9dbe45d1f1747747ea7f5bc534dedc81504226e8f3287dab6725674509db03) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab6ef4d5d7899248ce50af4a8b4a4e3e1b00eb040d7b2bc201f80c1d0cf94f4ce723994619a43df616) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d48464c5d272bdd275830b18c14aaad32f1a64ea8026e6a38af6d)
---

name: DNC War Room
subject: re: Tearing apart Obamacare
body:
Republicans are sabotaging Obamacare. **Add your name if you're one of the millions who are fighting to protect Obamacare.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Health-Care-Sabotage1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171015_dnc2_nd&source=em_20171015_dnc2_nd")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ba6/4067b0a/445c00940/7e65d34c/3531662989/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171015_dnc2_nd&source=em_20171015_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ba6/4067b0a/445c00940/7e65d34d/3531662989/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171015_dnc2_nd&source=em_20171015_dnc2_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ba6/4067b0a/445c00940/7e65d34b/3531662989/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171015_dnc2_nd&source=em_20171015_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Gov. John Kasich was a guest on NBC's Meet the Press this
morning. Please take a few moments to watch the interview and
share it with your contacts on social media!

Peter, Gov. John Kasich was a
guest on NBC's Meet the Press this morning. Please take a few
moments to watch the interview and share it with your contacts on
social media!

Also, in case you missed the
announcement, Gov. Kasich will join former Vice President Joe
Biden on October 17th at 1:00PM ET for a bipartisan discussion
about how to bridge the many political divides that exist in our
country. The event will be hosted and moderated by the University
of Delaware. Use this link to watch live online on Tuesday.

Thank you for all of your
continued interest and support. If you'd like to donate to help
us pay for these updates and spread Gov. Kasich's message, please
consider making a generous contribution (here).

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isi8TFNo4N

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osi8TFNo4N

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-47306015428-echo3-DE1C4A6D049677D40D753F51A87E006A@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Debbie=E2=80=99s_iPad?=
subject: staying ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Hey friends, I just wanted to check in with you. I know, it's Sunday and the last thing you want to be doing is reading these emails. So I'm going to keep this quick. We've got a big deadline tonight if we want to stay on track and hit our October goal. President Trump and Congressional Republicans are working around the clock to tear away the progress we fought so hard to achieve. I'm doing everything in my power to push back against them, but I need your help. [_**Can I count on you to help us hit this goal so I can continue to devote my full energy towards containing Trump?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e16/622b7b5b/6863569/307bd114/713626991/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171016?refcode=dwse171016_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e16/622b7b5b/6863569/307bd114/713626991/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171016?refcode=dwse171016_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e16/622b7b5b/6863569/307bd117/713626991/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171016?refcode=dwse171016_m&recurring=true&amount=10")
---
[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e16/622b7b5b/6863569/307bd116/713626991/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171016?refcode=dwse171016_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e16/622b7b5b/6863569/307bd109/713626991/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171016?refcode=dwse171016_m&recurring=true")
---
Thank you,
Debbie
Sent from my iPad
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

clean_body: | | | | | Hey friends, I just wanted to check in with you. I know, it's Sunday and the last thing you want to be doing is reading these emails. So I'm going to keep this quick. We've got a big deadline tonight if we want to stay on track and hit our October goal. President Trump and Congressional Republicans are working around the clock to tear away the progress we fought so hard to achieve. I'm doing everything in my power to push back against them, but I need your help. "" | "" "" "" "" Thank you, Debbie Sent from my iPad Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe

name: Florida Democrats
subject: Introducing Ryan Torrens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend,

As we promised, we want to keep you up-to-date on Democrats running for statewide positions in 2018. Ensuring Florida Democrats know about our candidates and their stances on the issues will be critical to getting some big wins in 2018 and beyond.

That's why we'd like to introduce Ryan Torrens, who has declared his intention to run for Florida Attorney General.

Throughout his campaign, Ryan will be focusing on his career as a consumer advocate and his vision to protect Florida's consumers from predatory lenders, abusive debt collectors, and big banks. Ryan will also make Florida's opioid crisis a top priority. [](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc5b/1a5213b3/71b1c1b8/718b48c3/245029434/VEsH/ "http://www.ryanforattorneygeneral.com/?source=em101517_torrens") Ryan was raised in a middle-class family in Tampa, his father being a locksmith.

Ryan made the decision to start his own law practice to fight for Florida's consumers. Ryan has waged courtroom battles against some of the biggest banks in this country on behalf of our homeowners going through foreclosure.

Ryan has a proven track record of fighting hard for his consumer clients. Ryan now wants to fight for all Floridians.

**P.S. If you don 't want to receive these introductions to our candidates for statewide office, that's ok. [Click here, and we won't send you updates moving forward.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc5b/1a5213b3/71b1c1b8/718b48c2/245029434/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/receive-only-the-most-important-updates-?&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&source=em101517_torrens")**

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc5b/1a5213b3/71b1c1b8/718b4b3d/245029434/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&source=em101517_torrens") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Caroline Hall, RoyCooper.com
subject: The leaves are falling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Fall is a great time in North Carolina. The leaves turn beautiful colors, the state fair has all kinds of fried foods, and many get to spend time with family or friends on Thanksgiving.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120338f/2fde7c66/44547acc/1569b4ba/336085482/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-oct-deadline?utm_campaign=em17_171014_deadline_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&refcode=em17_171014_deadline_fnd_gq_ful__RC&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
friend,

Fall is a great time in North Carolina. The leaves turn beautiful colors, the state fair has all kinds of fried foods, and many get to spend time with family or friends on Thanksgiving.

It's also a reminder that we're getting closer to the end of the year. As Roy's North Carolina finance director, that means I have to make sure stay on pace with our budget.

**October 16th (tomorrow!) is our mid-month fundraising deadline. Our goal is to raise $3,500 before the clock strikes midnight. Will you help us?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
